import re
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

def task_func(text, rwidth=0.8):
    # Remove non-alphanumeric characters and convert to lowercase
    word_regex = re.compile('[a-zA-Z0-9]+')
    words = [word.lower() for word in word_regex.findall(text)]

    # Check if any words are found
    if not words:
        return plt.subplots(), []

    # Calculate the frequency of each word length
    word_lengths = [len(word) for word in words]

    # Create and plot the histogram
    fig, ax = plt.subplots()
    ax.hist(word_lengths, bins=np.arange(max(word_lengths) + 1), rwidth=rwidth)

    # Set title and labels for the histogram
    ax.set_title('Word Length Distribution')
    ax.set_xlabel('Word Length')
    ax.set_ylabel('Frequency')

    return fig, word_lengths
